final:
module RefModule(
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input B1,
    output Y,
    input VPWR,
    input VGND,
    input VPB,
    input VNB
);wire unused_w1, w2;

    // Removed the instantiation of the unknown module
    // instead, let’s directly create the logic from the inputs

    assign unused_w1 = A1 & A2;  // Logical AND between A1 and A2
    assign w2 = B1 & !A2; // Logical AND between B1 and NOT A2
    assign Y = unused_w1 | w2;   // Final output Y is the logical OR of unused_w1 and w2

endmodule
